title: Keep basis loss, remove direct basis prompt mixing

queries: retrieval-augmented prompting graph residual prompt mixing tabular llm
representation alignment residual prompt tuning graph llm tabular reasoning

evidence.why_now: No-basis ablation failed broadly, so the next narrow ablation is to retain basis supervision but remove prompt-space residual mixing.

hypothesis: The harm may come from direct basis-driven prompt rewriting rather than from the basis supervision signal itself.
notes: This bundle is stored mainly as a parser/judge example.
